query:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND gated IS NOT TRUE) AS ungated_count,
                       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND gated) AS gated_count,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND gated IS NOT TRUE)
                           AS oldest_ungated
                FROM (
                    SELECT scheduled_for,
                           scheduled_for <= NOW() - $2::interval AS overdue,
                           concurrency_gate_id = ANY($3::text[]) AS gated
                    FROM v2_job_queue
                    WHERE tag = $1 AND running = false
                ) q
